traits.name: Relentless Endurance (1/day)
traits.text: When Vorra is reduced to 0 hit points but not killed outright, she drops to 1 hit point instead.

traits.name: Tactical Withdrawal
traits.text: When reduced below 20 HP, Vorra uses the Dash action as a bonus action and attempts to flee toward the Ritual Chamber, shouting a warning to Serevath.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.text: Vorra makes two Orcish Blade attacks.

actions.name: Orcish Blade
actions.text: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8+3) slashing damage. On a hit, if the target is concentrating on a spell, it has disadvantage on the Constitution saving throw to maintain concentration.

actions.name: Throw Flask (Recharge 5–6)
actions.text: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 20/40 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (2d4) fire damage and the target must succeed on a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw or be set alight, taking 2 (1d4) fire damage at the start of each of its turns until it uses an action to extinguish the flames.
